blocks.content: Brr. It's freezing. What's going on? Why is Ms. Siena casting magic?

blocks.speaker: Lucas
blocks.content: Maybe she's regained her senses? She might have awakened after falling off the cliff.

blocks.speaker: Lucas
blocks.content: Doesn't seem like it. What kind of magic is this? It's unlike her. At this rate, we'll all freeze to death.
Nade was equally puzzled.
Hundreds of students were here.
It was unlikely they could survive sub-zero temperatures for long without memories.
But the blizzard's pressure on Lucas was undeniable.
Cooling cells would weaken his Mitochondria Build.

blocks.speaker: Lucas
blocks.content: Damn it! This is insane!
Lucas, battered by the blizzard's winds, felt his extremities necrotizing.
Mages often started battles with blizzards—not for lethality but for the constant chill, a staple against swordsmen.

blocks.speaker: Lucas
blocks.content: Ugh. Mages are the worst.
Lucas hated their tricks.
But giving up wasn't an option.
And Siena's state was clearly abnormal.
An ice spear pierced the blizzard.
Lucas dodged but, weakened, took a graze to his side.

blocks.speaker: Lucas
blocks.content: Damn it!
Most creatures slowed in the cold.
Pushing through, his fingertips showed frostbite.

blocks.speaker: Lucas
blocks.content: It"s getting colder. Does she really plan to kill us all?
A Schema user getting frostbite meant students should've frozen already.
Yet only Lucas was trapped in the blizzard, which now homed in on him.

blocks.speaker: Lucas
blocks.content: You're insane! How long will you keep this up——?
Lucas froze.
Siena's eyes were still empty—no emotion, no thought, not even self-awareness.

blocks.speaker: Lucas
blocks.content: Don't tell me…….
His shoulders trembled.
Her body remembered the magic.
Literally, muscle memory.
Just as swordsmen drilled techniques through repetition, Siena had engraved spell patterns into her brainwaves, even without memories.

blocks.speaker: Lucas
blocks.content: How much has she trained?
His hair stood on end.
Beyond skill, her path of suffering was unimaginable.

blocks.speaker: Lucas
blocks.content: Damn it! This is worse than stepping in shit.
He had to retreat.
No bounty was worth his life.
Lucas fled with all his might.
If he escaped the blizzard, she wouldn't chase.
But his hope was delusional.
Turning his back on a 6th-class mage came at a price.

blocks.speaker: Lucas
blocks.content: Gyaaaaah!
Siena pointed,
and Lucas screamed as he was buried in snow.
No pain, but his legs were gone—frozen solid, utterly numb.

blocks.speaker: Lucas
blocks.content: No way…….
Absolute Zero.
A supreme ice spell halting particle motion through preservation and condensation.
Siena had mastered it by 20, earning her 6th-class rank.
But even she could only achieve localized effects due to the immense mental strain.

blocks.speaker: Lucas
blocks.content: Damn it! This "mediocre school" is full of monsters!
Siena emotionlessly cast her next spell—Glacier Bombing, a high-tier ice spell derived from Absolute Zero.
Dozens of massive ice blocks formed in the sky,
draining the color from Lucas's face.
With no legs, escape was impossible.
His fate was in the heavens' hands.
Nade and Iruki rushed to the students.
Though not area-wide, the ice blocks were massive enough to be deadly.
As they collided,
one almond-shaped glacier began falling toward the students.
Nade grabbed Arin,
tackling her to the ground.

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: Eek! What are you doing?!

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Evacuate the students! Or they'll all die!

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: No! There's no time!

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: I'll handle it!

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: How?
Iruki clenched his teeth.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Was it possible? The glacier weighed dozens of tons.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Even if he shattered it, fragments would rain down.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: It needed to split into over 1000 pieces to avoid fatalities.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: No choice…….

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Momentum could be calculated mathematically.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: If he split, split, and split again, he could destroy it before impact.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Here I gooooo!
His detachable Spirit Zone pierced the glacier's core.
An atomic bomb triggered,
splitting it into seven chunks.
Iruki activated Double Spirit Zone,
madly firing atomic bombs to shatter the ice.
Boom! Boom! Boom! Boom!
Ice flowers bloomed.
Fragments scattered like fireworks.
Nade and Arin stared, dumbfounded.
Hail-like shards fell,
but no one was hurt.

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: So this is the magic academy… Huh?
Arin realized she was pressed against a stranger's chest.
Shoving Nade away,

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: Get off! What are you doing?

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: W-what! After I helped you!

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: Why help me? We're enemies!

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Says who? Hurry and lift the mind control! Do you really want to kill them all? Are you sane?
Arin bit her lip.
She'd become a mass murderer in history books,
but she felt no fear.

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: I don't care. For Canis, even if the whole world dies.
Nade saw the emptiness and bitterness in her eyes.
What kind of life had she lived to harbor such a gaze?

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Hup.
Iruki carried Siena on his back.
Lucas, half-buried,
had lost his legs and his jaw hung slack.
His thieving days were over—back to Inferno's gloomy prison in seven days.
Boom!
A deafening roar drew their attention.
A massive beam shot through the forest.

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: Whoa. What's that?

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Photon Cannon. Did he have an epiphany?
The forest shook as Shirone was flung out,
battered.

blocks.speaker: Arin
blocks.content: Canis must've gained the upper hand.
But her hopes were dashed.
Harvest knocked down trees,
revealing Canis limping.
His state was worse than Shirone's.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Huh?
